subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 728740048/240204491 is not a GRB
body:
C. Malacaria (ISSI) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 728740048/240204491 at 11:47:23.81 UT on 04 February 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to a solar flare.
